listings.name: IMS Learning Resources
listings.address: Head office in Mumbai; 90+ centres across 50+ cities in India
listings.about: IMS Learning Resources is one of India's oldest test-preparation institutes, founded in Mumbai in 1977 — decades before CAT coaching became an industry. Today it operates a network of roughly 90+ centres across more than 50 Indian cities, alongside full online programs. IMS covers CAT, MH-CET, GMAT, GRE, CLAT, IPMAT and other management and study-abroad exams, and is known for its structured classroom programs, SimCAT mock test series and one-on-one mentorship. Tens of thousands of students enrol in IMS programs every year. Its long track record makes it a common benchmark against which newer CAT coaching brands are compared.
highlights: Founded in 1977 — among India's first CAT test-prep institutes
90+ centres in 50+ cities, plus complete online programs
SimCAT mock series is one of the most widely taken CAT test series in India

listings.name: Career Launcher
listings.address: Headquartered in New Delhi; 200+ learning centres across India, Dubai and Abu Dhabi
listings.about: Career Launcher was founded in 1995 by Satya Narayanan R, an IIM Bangalore alumnus, and has grown into one of India's largest test-prep companies. It runs over 200 learning centres across India along with international centres in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, and offers classroom, hybrid and online programs. While CAT and MBA entrance preparation remain its flagship, Career Launcher also coaches for CLAT, IPMAT, CUET, GRE, GMAT and civil services. The company employs a large full-time faculty and is known for its mentor-led approach, where students are paired with mentors rather than left to self-study alone.
highlights: Founded 1995 by IIM Bangalore alumnus Satya Narayanan R
200+ learning centres across India plus Dubai and Abu Dhabi
Mentor-led model with a large full-time teaching faculty

listings.name: Hitbullseye
listings.address: E-305, Phase 8A, Industrial Area, Mohali; centres in Chandigarh, Ludhiana, Patiala, Yamunanagar and Ambala
listings.about: Hitbullseye (Bulls Eye) is a test-prep institute founded in 1996 by a team of XLRI and IIM alumni, headquartered in Mohali near Chandigarh. It runs six physical centres across five North Indian cities — two in Chandigarh and one each in Ludhiana, Patiala, Yamunanagar and Ambala — and reaches students nationwide through its large free online portal, which is used by lakhs of aspirants for mock tests and practice material. Courses cover CAT and other MBA entrances, CLAT, IPMAT, banking exams, GRE and GMAT. The strongest reason students cite for Hitbullseye is the amount of quality material available free before committing to a paid course.
highlights: Founded 1996 by XLRI and IIM alumni, headquartered in Mohali
Six centres across five cities in North India
Large free online portal for mocks and practice used by lakhs of students

listings.name: CATKing Educare
listings.address: Mumbai-based; classroom centres in Mumbai plus live online programs pan-India
listings.about: CATKing Educare is a Mumbai-based MBA coaching institute founded by Sumit Singh Gandhi, an SPJIMR Mumbai PGDM graduate with a B.Tech from NIT Karnataka and executive education from Harvard. Unusually for the industry, CATKing runs no franchisees — the founder personally teaches the VARC live classes, and the faculty is drawn from IIM, SP Jain, NMIMS, JBIMS and NIT alumni. It offers classroom programs in Mumbai and live online courses nationally, covering CAT, MH-CET, GMAT and GRE. Students often choose CATKing for its mentorship-heavy style and strong focus on Maharashtra B-schools alongside the IIMs.
highlights: Founded by SPJIMR alumnus Sumit Singh Gandhi, who still teaches VARC classes himself
No-franchisee model — all programs run directly by the core team
Strong coverage of MH-CET and Maharashtra B-schools alongside CAT

listings.name: Rodha
listings.address: Online — YouTube-first CAT preparation, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha is a YouTube-first CAT preparation platform founded by Ravi Prakash, an engineer-turned-educator who scored a 99.86 percentile in CAT himself. Started around 2017–18, Rodha built its following by putting a full CAT syllabus — over 1,400 videos — on YouTube for free, where the channel has grown past 400,000 subscribers. Paid courses add structured batches, test series and doubt support at prices deliberately kept low compared with legacy institutes. Coverage extends beyond CAT to XAT, SNAP and NMAT. Rodha suits self-driven aspirants who want to start free and pay only for structure and practice.
highlights: 1,400+ free full-syllabus videos on YouTube (400K+ subscribers)
Founded by Ravi Prakash, a 99.86 percentile CAT scorer
Deliberately low-cost paid courses compared with legacy institutes

listings.name: Cracku
listings.address: Online — app and web platform, available pan-India
listings.about: Cracku is an online test-prep platform founded in 2014 by IIT and IIM alumni, led by Maruti Konduri — an IIT Bombay and IIM Ahmedabad graduate who has scored a 100 percentile in CAT five times (2019, 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024). The platform is built around structured daily targets, video courses, sectional tests and mock series delivered through its app and website. Alongside CAT and other MBA entrances, Cracku also covers IPMAT, CLAT and several government exams. It is a fit for aspirants who prefer app-based self-paced preparation with clear daily plans over live classroom timetables.
highlights: Led by Maruti Konduri: IIT Bombay + IIM Ahmedabad, five-time CAT 100-percentiler
Founded 2014 by a team of IIT-IIM alumni
App-based prep with daily targets, videos and mock series

listings.name: iQuanta
listings.address: Online — live classes and 24/7 doubt community, available pan-India
listings.about: iQuanta is an online CAT coaching platform founded in 2019 by Indrajeet Singh, who first became known in India's largest Facebook CAT-preparation community by solving aspirants' quant doubts within minutes — earning the nickname 'Wizard of Quant'. That community, now counting over 4 lakh members, remains central to how iQuanta works: fast, round-the-clock doubt resolution alongside live classes and test series. The platform reports strong percentile outcomes among its students each year and has expanded into IPMAT and CLAT preparation. iQuanta suits aspirants who value community-driven prep and instant doubt support over recorded self-paced content.
highlights: Grew out of a 4-lakh+ member CAT preparation community
Founded 2019 by Indrajeet Singh, known for rapid-fire quant doubt solving
24/7 doubt resolution is the platform's signature feature

listings.name: MBA Wallah (Physics Wallah)
listings.address: Online — via the PW app and pw.live, available pan-India
listings.about: MBA Wallah is the MBA entrance vertical of Physics Wallah (PW), one of India's largest edtech companies, known for aggressive affordability. Its CAT and OMET batches — such as the MBA Pro and MBA Elite series — bundle live and recorded classes, thousands of practice questions, daily practice problems, weekly tests and mock series, delivered through the PW app and website. Batches are structured for both regular students and working professionals, including weekend-only options. MBA Wallah is a natural pick for aspirants who want PW's signature low-fee, high-volume content model applied to CAT preparation.
highlights: MBA vertical of Physics Wallah, one of India's largest edtech platforms
Thousands of live/recorded classes and practice questions per batch
Weekend-only batch options designed for working professionals

listings.name: Unacademy CAT
listings.address: Online — via the Unacademy app and unacademy.com, available pan-India
listings.about: Unacademy CAT is the MBA entrance category on Unacademy, one of India's largest online learning platforms. Rather than a single faculty team, it aggregates many independent top educators — including CAT 100-percentilers — who teach live classes daily on quant, verbal, and LRDI, alongside recorded courses, practice and test series available under the platform's subscription model. A substantial amount of content is free to watch before subscribing. The category has built a large learner base, and its strength is choice: aspirants can sample multiple teaching styles and follow the educators that click for them.
highlights: Aggregates many independent top educators, including CAT 100-percentilers
Subscription model with daily live classes plus free-to-watch content
Learners can switch between educators to find a teaching style that fits

listings.name: MBA Pathshala
listings.address: Online — live and recorded programs, available pan-India
listings.about: MBA Pathshala is an online CAT coaching platform founded by Udit Saini, a Quantitative Aptitude and LRDI educator with over eight years of teaching experience, together with co-founder Suman Shekhawat, a VARC mentor who was previously among the top-ranked CAT educators on Unacademy. The platform runs live and recorded batches covering CAT, MH-CET and other MBA entrances, with mock tests and strategy sessions included. Positioned as an affordable, mentor-close alternative to the big institutes, it appeals to aspirants who want direct access to a small core faculty rather than a large rotating one.
highlights: Founded by Quant/LRDI educator Udit Saini with 8+ years of teaching experience
Co-founder Suman Shekhawat was a top-ranked CAT VARC educator on Unacademy
Small core faculty with direct mentor access, positioned on affordability
